response.justification: Bogdan has over 15 years of solid software engineering experience and an entrepreneurial background, fulfilling the minimum baseline requirements. However, the role demands a Director-level Principal Engineer with deep, recognized expertise in AI strategy, machine learning, and cloud platform architecture. Bogdan's background is primarily in full-stack and backend development, with only brief, recent exposure to AI tooling, which falls significantly short of the strategic AI leadership and customer advisory capabilities required for this position.
strengths: Over 15 years of diverse software engineering experience across multiple tech stacks and domains.
Entrepreneurial initiative demonstrated by founding and maintaining an open-source Geo-Data platform.
Strong track record of technical knowledge sharing through workshops, conference talks, and open-source contributions.
concerns: Lacks the Director-level strategic leadership and enterprise customer advisory experience expected for this role.
AI/ML expertise is very limited, consisting mainly of a recent 6-month stint working on AI-agent infrastructure.
Does not possess the preferred advanced degree (Master's or PhD) in an AI-related field.
